title: Message/queryChanges returns all IDs as added instead of real delta
description: Client sends Message/queryChanges with sinceQueryState that differs from current state → response returns up to 256 current message IDs as added with removed always empty. RFC 8620 §5.4 requires queryChanges to reflect actual additions and removals since sinceQueryState. jmap.rs message_query_changes() uses the same false-delta pattern as Space/queryChanges — any state mismatch yields all current IDs as added, making incremental sync impossible and causing clients to re-fetch messages they already have.
